immunity: Death does not bleed by its own power.

circle_of_death.cast: [31m[!][0m The Death traces an ominous trajectory of death. Three tokens begin to pulsate.
circle_of_death.countdown: [31m[!][0m {{name}}: After {{timer}} pulsations, the trajectory will complete and bring ruin.
circle_of_death.fail: The trajectory of death is complete. There is no escape.
circle_of_death.fake: The token shatters feebly. The trap of death was not designed for this place.
circle_of_death.immunity: The children of death cannot scar the trajectory drawn by their father.
